pairs.question: Who hosted the 2020 MTV Video Music Awards?
pairs.answer: Keke Palmer hosted the 2020 MTV Video Music Awards, which was the 37th annual ceremony.

pairs.question: How many awards did Lady Gaga win at the 2020 MTV Video Music Awards, and what special recognition did she receive?
pairs.answer: Lady Gaga won five awards at the 2020 MTV Video Music Awards. She also received the inaugural MTV Tricon Award for her achievements in three or more fields of entertainment.

pairs.question: Which artists were tied for the most nominations at the 2020 MTV Video Music Awards?
pairs.answer: Lady Gaga and Ariana Grande were tied for the most nominations at the 2020 MTV Video Music Awards, each receiving nine nominations.

pairs.question: When did fan voting for the 2020 MTV Video Music Awards begin and end?
pairs.answer: Fan voting for the 2020 MTV Video Music Awards began in July and ended on August 23, 2020.

pairs.question: How many viewers watched the 2020 MTV Video Music Awards in its first-run viewing, and how did this compare to the previous ceremony?
pairs.answer: The 2020 MTV Video Music Awards received 6.4 million viewers in its first-run viewing, which was a 5% decrease from the 6.8 million viewers at the previous ceremony.

pairs.question: Which categories had their nominees announced on August 24, 2020?
pairs.answer: The nominees for Song of Summer, Best Group, and Everyday Heroes: Frontline Medical Workers were released on August 24, 2020.

pairs.question: Describe the format of the 2020 MTV Video Music Awards ceremony.
pairs.answer: The 2020 MTV Video Music Awards ceremony was held virtually due to the COVID-19 pandemic, primarily from New York City. For the first time, it was also broadcast on U.S. television via The CW, alongside MTV and other ViacomCBS cable networks.

pairs.question: What was the significance of the 2020 MTV Video Music Awards ceremony being dedicated to Chadwick Boseman?
pairs.answer: The 2020 MTV Video Music Awards ceremony was dedicated to Chadwick Boseman, who passed away from colon cancer two days before the event. This tribute highlighted his impact on the entertainment industry.
